tagline: Boolean alias formatting: Boolean values now support alias formatting, allowing users to replace "true" and "false" with custom strings.
what_it_does: Boolean alias formatting: Boolean values now support alias formatting, allowing users to replace "true" and "false" with custom strings. Compact global filters: Reduced the size of global filters to save space. Relative date range options: Relative date range filters now include yesterday, last week, last month, and last year.
why_it_matters: Compact global filters: Reduced the size of global filters to save space.
